creator: Burkely Hermann
description: This twelve-page e-book consists of three chapters, along with concluding words I wrote in August 2023. It post focuses on the proposed closure of the National Archives facility in Seattle, which was first proposed in late 2019 and cancelled by a court decision in February 2021. All three pieces were part of the reason I later joined the Steering Committee of the Issues and Advocacy Section, within the Society of American Archivists.

title: More than a warehouse: Importance of the National Archives facility in Seattle, its proposed closure, and records management
